stemHtml: What type of signal can be expected if a pilot tunes the radio equipment to a frequency of 112.5 MHz?

options.a: It is an invalid frequency for aviation use.
options.b: It is a VOR frequency used for navigation.
options.c: It is a frequency used for air-to-air communication between aircraft.
options.d: The pilot will hear the signal much louder than normal voice channels.
